rulings.Case Title: KUO H. CHANG, TRUSTEE OF THE CHANG YUAN FAMILY VS. NAVEEN SINGHA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 01, 2011, line 1. Defendant Naveen Singha's Motion to Quash Service of Summons. Motion to Qusah denied i.e., improper motion previously denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KUO H. CHANG, TRUSTEE OF THE CHANG YUAN FAMILY VS. NAVEEN SINGHA et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 01, 2011, line 1. Defendant Naveen Singha's demurrer. Demurrer overruled also improper fails to address the allegations in the body of the complaint; five days to answer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DIANA GONG VS. PATRICK FOO TZENG et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 01, 2011, line 2. Defendant Patrick Foo Tzeng's Demurrer to Complaint. Sustained without leave to amend. Three day notice fatally defective i.e., failed to contain information re Rent Board Advice. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ELVIRA L. LOW, AS TRUSTEE OF THE ELVIRA LOW FAMILY et al VS. MICHELLE YOUNGSTROM et al
